channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Armed fighters attack multiple towns across Mali
item.description: Tuareg-led armed ⁠group says it attacked northern town where Malian troops and Russian fighters are based.

item.title: Saudi-led coalition pledges ‘unprecedented’ force against Houthi threats
item.description: Threats escalate after Houthis block Saudi warplanes, allowing Iranian plane to land in Sanaa for first time in decade.

item.title: Key takeaways from Round of 32 stage at World Cup 2026
item.description: A thrilling Golden Boot race hots up, France in scintillating form, and Messi and Argentina squeak past Cape Verde.

item.title: Cape Verde fans celebrate history despite loss
item.description: Cape Verde fans celebrate history despite loss

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 23: Argentina and Egypt survive thrillers to advance
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce marry at NYC’s Madison Square Garden
item.description: A-list celebrities attend wedding at Madison Square Garden to see superstar couple tie the knot.

item.title: Trump praises army, rails against communism in US 250th anniversary speech
item.description: At Mount Rushmore Trump warns of 'communist menace', ties rhetoric to immigration ahead of November midterms.

item.title: At 250, America is still deciding who belongs
item.description: Birthright citizenship survived, but the fight over who is fully recognised as American is far from over.

item.title: France vs Paraguay: World Cup Round of 16 – Mbappe, prediction, kickoff
item.description: France have been the best team so far at the World Cup, although Paraguay are confident after upsetting Germany.

item.title: Could Israel really build settlements in Gaza?
item.description: After a genocidal war and famine, leading Israeli politicians say they are now ready to settle Gaza.

item.title: Trump calls communism a ‘mortal threat’ at US 250th birthday event
item.description: Trump calls communism a ‘mortal threat’ at US 250th birthday event.

item.title: FIFA World Cup: Round of 16 match schedule and which teams qualified
item.description: Full list of teams in the World Cup's last-16, who they play for a place in the quarterfinals and match start times.

item.title: Thirty-two years on, young Rwandans reflect on progress, pain and hope
item.description: For many young Rwandans, Liberation Day is as much about the future as the past.

item.title: Arias sends Colombia into World Cup last-16 with 1-0 win over Ghana
item.description: The World Cup round of 32 ends with Colombia beating Ghana 1-0, as Jhon Arias sends the South Americans through.

item.title: Ahead of Morocco vs Canada at the World Cup, comparisons arise with the 2022 team
item.description: Despite the ups and downs between the two World Cups, Morocco have once again risen as the top Arab and African team.

item.title: ‘El Obeid crisis could be worse than El Fasher,’ warns ex-UN official
item.description: Mukesh Kapila, ex-UN Humanitarian Coordinator for Sudan warns that, 'El Obeid crisis could be worse than El Fasher'.

item.title: Ronaldo sends message to Venezuelan earthquake survivor
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo has sent a message to a young Venezuelan earthquake survivor, recovering in hospital.

item.title: Messi scores again but Argentina given World Cup upset fright by Cape Verde
item.description: Lionel Messi opens scoring but Argentina taken to extra time by Cape Verde, which threatened greatest World Cup upset.

item.title: Egypt coach dedicates World Cup win to Palestine as Gaza celebrates
item.description: Fans in Gaza celebrated Egypt's win at match screenings held against the backdrop of bombed buildings.

item.title: England vs Mexico World Cup knockout match to go ahead as scheduled
item.description: No decision was ever made to reschedule the kickoff time of 6pm local time in Mexico City, sources tell Al Jazeera.

item.title: Iran war live: Millions expected in Tehran for funeral of Ali Khamenei
item.description: Huge crowds gather in Iran's Tehran for the funeral of the late Supreme leader Ali Khamenei.

item.title: Quakes reduce Venezuela tourist town to rubble, leaving economy in tatters
item.description: Quakes reduce Venezuela tourist town to rubble, leaving economy in tatters.

item.title: Egypt say Dallas police officer pushed player, team director at World Cup
item.description: A security officer pushed the fan, as well as Trezeguet and Hassan, at the team hotel in Dallas before Egypt's match.

item.title: Venezuela’s Rodriguez blames ‘propaganda’ for quake response backlash
item.description: Venezuela's acting president Delcy Rodriguez dismissed criticism of the government's response.

item.title: Venezuela’s Rodriguez blames ‘propaganda’ for quake response backlash
item.description: Venezuela's acting president Delcy Rodriguez dismissed criticism of the government's quake response.
